hero.description: My name is Noelia Bas and I am a translator from French, English and Russian into Spanish

cta.titulo: Shall we see how your project would look?
cta.descripcion: This is just a scroll demo. We can adjust fonts, colors, and animations to your preferred style.

hook.frase: Behind every text there is a story worth telling well

servicios.descripcion: Sample placeholder text. We explain how the message is adapted to the right register and real reader, not just grammar.

proyectos.descripcion: Simple plan: I receive the material, clarify the goal, create a base glossary, and deliver reviewed versions with tracked changes.

translation.title: Translation
translation.body: Every word counts and every nuance matters. With my translations, your message doesn't just change language: it is transformed to sound natural, precise, and authentic. Whether it's an article, a business text, or creative content, I adapt each sentence to reflect your original intent, respecting the style and voice you want to project.

body.part1: Videos are not only watched, they are felt. With my subtitling services, every line fits
body.highlight: perfectly with the image and the rhythm of the content
body.part2: , maintaining clarity and emotion. The result: a viewer who understands, connects, and enjoys, without distractions or loss of meaning.

body.part1: Global content needs a local approach. With localization, I adapt your text, app, or website so it
body.part2: , without losing your identity. Every detail, from expressions to cultural references, is adjusted so your audience feels understood and connected.
